# Reach Beyond Therapy

> Reach Beyond Therapy is a boutique hand and upper extremity rehabilitation clinic in Redondo Beach, California. Led by Jade Wong, OTR/L, CHT — a Certified Hand Therapist with over 10 years of clinical experience — the clinic provides expert, one-on-one care for hand, wrist, elbow, and shoulder injuries. Every session is conducted directly by Jade, with no aides or shared appointments. The clinic serves patients from Redondo Beach, Torrance, Hermosa Beach, Manhattan Beach, El Segundo, and Palos Verdes.

## Clinic Details
- **Name:** Reach Beyond Therapy
- **Address:** 2512 Artesia Blvd, Suite 305F, Redondo Beach, CA 90278
- **Phone:** 323-844-8450
- **Email:** jade@reachbeyondtherapy.com
- **Lead Therapist:** Jade Wong, OTR/L, CHT (Certified Hand Therapist, 10+ years experience)
- **Insurance:** In-network with Medicare Part B. PPO out-of-network benefits available with claims assistance.
- **Hours:** Monday 8:30 AM–4:30 PM · Tuesday 8:30 AM–5:00 PM · Wednesday 8:30 AM–4:30 PM · Thursday 8:30 AM–5:00 PM · Friday 8:30 AM–4:30 PM · Saturday–Sunday Closed
- **Approach:** Boutique 1:1 — no aides, no shared sessions, individualized treatment plans

## What We Treat
Carpal tunnel syndrome, cubital tunnel syndrome, trigger finger, De Quervain's tenosynovitis, TFCC tears, wrist sprains and fractures, scaphoid fractures, radial nerve palsy, finger dislocations and ligament injuries, arthritis (osteoarthritis and rheumatoid), tennis elbow (lateral epicondylitis), golfer's elbow (medial epicondylitis), Dupuytren's contracture, mallet finger, tendon injuries, nerve injuries, lymphedema, post-surgical rehabilitation for hand and upper extremity procedures, and custom splinting/orthosis fabrication.

## Services
- **Certified Hand Therapy:** One-on-one evaluation and treatment for hand, wrist, elbow, and shoulder conditions
- **Custom Splinting & Orthosis Fabrication:** On-site thermoplastic splints for fingers, hands, wrists, and elbows
- **Specialized Modalities:** Electrical stimulation, Graston technique, cupping therapy, laser therapy (LLLT), tuning fork therapy, thermal modalities
- **In-Home Visits:** Available for patients with transportation difficulties

## Common Questions
**What is a Certified Hand Therapist?** A CHT is an occupational or physical therapist who has passed a national certification exam and completed a minimum of 4,000 hours of direct clinical experience in hand and upper extremity therapy. Fewer than 7,000 CHTs exist in the United States.

**Do you accept insurance?** Reach Beyond Therapy is in-network with Medicare Part B. Patients with PPO plans may be eligible for out-of-network reimbursement. The team assists with benefits verification and claims submission.

**Do I need a referral?** Direct access is available in most cases. Medicare and some plans require a physician referral. Contact the clinic for guidance specific to your insurance.

**Where is the clinic?** 2512 Artesia Blvd, Suite 305F, Redondo Beach, CA 90278. In-home visits are also available.

**How long does hand therapy take?** Minor injuries may resolve in 4–6 weeks. Complex or post-surgical cases typically require 3–6 months. A personalized timeline is provided at the initial evaluation.
